body:
So the AI agent for both `--tool claude` and `--tool agent` should at the same time it does look for CI checks, he also should check all recent comments to the issue/pull request, not to miss any latest feedback before finishing.

Also we need to include and idea to add in todo/checklist a step to check that repository does not have any uncommitted changes, that should be either committed or discarded. This we need to add if we don't have yet have such a hint.

All should be kept in the style of `When x do y.` with gentle hints, not commands.

Please download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, find root causes of the problem, and propose possible solutions.
title: Add a note to system message, that it might be useful to check comments to pull request/issue not only in the beginning of the work, but also after work is finished
